name: EuiFlyout
description: Slide-in overlay panel anchored to the viewport edge.
visualDescription: A full-height panel anchored to and sliding in from the right (default) or left edge of the viewport. Covers a portion of the page (medium default width ~480px) with a semi-transparent dark overlay behind it. Has a distinct header bar at the top (containing a title and an × close button in the top-right corner), a scrollable body region, and an optional sticky footer with action buttons. NOT EuiModal (which is centered, not edge-anchored). NOT a sidebar nav (EuiFlyout is transient/overlay, nav is persistent).
example: <EuiFlyout as="div" type="overlay" side="right" size="m" paddingSize="l" hasAnimation pushMinBreakpoint="l" closeButtonPosition="inside" ownFocus showCustomActions />
